reference: Hello. I had keyhole surgery on my right knee two weeks ago. I ruptured my knee capsule and bled into my knee joint. About an hour ago, I got out of bed and suddenly experienced pain, swelling, and stiffness above the knee where my femoral vein is located. It is the middle of the night, but I do not know what to do.
text: Hello, I had keyhole surgery on my right knee two weeks ago. I ruptured my knee capsule and bled into my knee joint. About an hour ago, I got out of bed and suddenly experienced pain, swelling, and stiffness above the knee femoral vein is located. It is the middle of the night, but I do not know what to do.
